body.u: I left school at seventeen after staying one year in the sixth form. I waited three months before I got the job I wanted, which was in insurance. I stayed on the Isle of Sheppey living with my parents until I was twenty one. At this particular time of my life I moved to Maidstone nearer my company. I had to move because travelling became a problem, and I had moved up the promotion ladder. So I had more responsibility.

From about the age of twenty one to about twenty six my life seemed quiet with nothing much happening. When I was twenty eight I had planned to live abroad and work for a company in Europe. I was turned down because I had not much experience of foreign languages. I remember very well, being upset by this. I thought that past could well of changed my whole life.
At the age of thirty I got married. At the age of thirty two we had our first child a boy. About three months later I was promoted to sub manager.

With my job I was meeting different people and going to special functions. This was different to when I was at school because I was shy and quiet. When I was thirty four we had our second child this was a girl. Two years later I decided to stand for the local council, and to my surprise I got on by a majority of six hundred. I only stayed on the council until I was forty two. I came off because it was interfering with my family and work life. When I was in my middle fortys my wife and I were thinking of emigrating but decided against it because it could interfere with the childrens schooling.

When I was forty eight I left the insurance company to work for a big industrial firm and join the board of directors. They needed someone who had a experience in Insurance because a lot of my work was to deal with the keeping of the companys head above water, keep safe. At the age of fifty three my wife and I emigrated to Austria, because the company wanted to expand in central Europe.
When I retired two years ago my wife and I decided to come back to England for the rest of our lifes. We are at present living in Norfolk.
